scope_summary: Close 5 Slava-found UI/product bugs and prove the full zero-to-end browser flow (new customer → new claim → docs → AI → decision → payout sim → audit) with a Playwright E2E suite. No commit, no push, no Azure.

bug_1_sidebar_double_active.root_cause: /claims NavLink lacked end:true; React Router prefix-match highlighted parent AND child simultaneously.
bug_1_sidebar_double_active.fix: end:true on every NavLink in Sidebar.tsx; sidebar-link-active class for E2E counter.

bug_2_customers_5_rows.root_cause: Frontend default VITE_INSURANCE_API_MODE='mock'; mock returned 5 hardcoded rows.
bug_2_customers_5_rows.fix: .env.development sets backend mode; catalog now reads from /api/customers.

bug_3_clm_mock_id.root_cause: Same as bug 2; mock createClaim returned synthesized CLM-MOCK-####.
bug_3_clm_mock_id.fix: Same .env.development flip; createClaim now POSTs to /api/claims and returns backend-allocated CLM-####.

root_causes: ClaimsListPage rendered rows.map unfiltered; search/filter/segment controls had no effect.
Default eventType filter was 'ДТП' silently hiding non-ДТП rows.
Queue was never reloaded after create.
bug_4_search_filter.fix: filterClaimRows applied; useEffect dispatches loadClaimsQueue on mount; modal close also refreshes; claimsSlice defaults eventType/date to 'Усі'.

bug_5_no_e2e.root_cause: No Playwright; reports relied on API smokes + xunit only.
bug_5_no_e2e.fix: @playwright/test installed; Chromium browser downloaded; playwright.config.ts with two webServer entries; 8 spec files / 32 test cases.

safety_checks.sk_prefix_substring_in_runtime_source: absent (only enumerated in 07-safety.spec.ts as the NEGATIVE assertion list)
safety_checks.deepseek_api_key_value: absent (only env var NAME appears in safety test forbidden list)

limitations: AI runs use Mock provider in E2E; DeepSeek opt-in path unchanged from prior gate.
Audit-trace E2E asserts category labels render, not specific row ids.
HybridClaimReadService still bridges sync→async via .GetAwaiter().GetResult() (inherited; not addressed here).
No screenshots/traces archived in handoff (no failures occurred to capture; configured only-on-failure).
